screens.name: Pitch Deck Slideshow
screens.description: 6-slide keyboard-navigable pitch deck. Full-screen black background, no NavHeader. Arrow keys + Space for navigation.

sections.navigation: Prev/Next arrows + dot indicators + keyboard (ArrowRight/Space=next, ArrowLeft=prev)

states.name: Slide 1: The Problem
states.description: First slide visible on page load — The Problem

elementDescriptions.The Problem: Slide 1 title — introduces the healthcare data problem being solved
elementDescriptions.Health data is scattered across siloed E: Slide 1, bullet 1 — describes data fragmentation across Electronic Health Record systems
elementDescriptions.Patients have zero control over who acce: Slide 1, bullet 2 — highlights lack of patient data sovereignty
elementDescriptions.AI analysis of medical data requires exp: Slide 1, bullet 3 — the privacy paradox of AI in healthcare
elementDescriptions.No incentive for patients to contribute: Slide 1, bullet 4 — missing economic incentive layer
elementDescriptions.Kosyn AI: Top-left brand logo/label — appears on every slide. Also the title of Slide 2
elementDescriptions.1 / 6: Top-right slide counter — computed from `{current + 1} / {slides.length}` React state. Updates on arrow key press or dot click navigation
elementDescriptions.Confidential Health Intelligence Protoco: Slide 2, bullet 1 — Kosyn's tagline and mission statement
elementDescriptions.Patients own their health data with pass: Slide 2, bullet 2 — patient data ownership via WebAuthn passkeys
elementDescriptions.AI analyzes records inside TEE enclaves: Slide 2, bullet 3 — TEE-based AI analysis for privacy
elementDescriptions.Earn from anonymized data marketplace: Slide 2, bullet 4 — patient economic incentive via KUSD earnings
elementDescriptions.Chainlink CRE: Confidential HTTP + Vault: Slide 3, bullet 1 — CRE runtime capabilities used
elementDescriptions.ACE PolicyEngine: On-chain HIPAA-equival: Slide 3, bullet 2 — smart contract access control layer
elementDescriptions.Gemini 2.0 Flash inside TEE: SOAP notes,: Slide 3, bullet 3 — AI model running inside TEE for clinical analysis
elementDescriptions.IPFS: Encrypted blobs only — never raw P: Slide 3, bullet 4 — storage layer for encrypted health data
elementDescriptions.How It Works: Slide 4 title — step-by-step flow of the protocol
elementDescriptions.1. Patient stores records — encrypted in: Slide 4, step 1 — record upload and encryption flow
elementDescriptions.2. Doctor requests access — patient appr: Slide 4, step 2 — consent-based access request flow
elementDescriptions.3. TEE decrypts, AI analyzes, results re: Slide 4, step 3 — confidential AI analysis inside enclave
elementDescriptions.Business Model: Slide 5 title — revenue and tokenomics overview
elementDescriptions.KUSD stablecoin for consultation payment: Slide 5, bullet 1 — KosynUSD as payment token for medical consultations
elementDescriptions.Data marketplace: patients earn from ano: Slide 5, bullet 2 — patient earnings from data marketplace participation
elementDescriptions.Provider subscriptions for AI clinical t: Slide 5, bullet 3 — B2B revenue from healthcare providers
elementDescriptions.Protocol fees on data marketplace querie: Slide 5, bullet 4 — protocol-level fees on data marketplace transactions
elementDescriptions.Team: Slide 6 title — team and hackathon information
